entities.name: MG-3+
entities.context: Downstream processing stage for structured portfolio/CRM updates and acquisition/partnership outreach preparation

entities.name: MG-6
entities.context: Transition stage that moves items from [M] to [P] status once downstream actions and follow-ups are logged

entities.name: CRM
entities.context: Customer relationship management system used for portfolio updates

entities.name: [P] status
entities.context: A status marker indicating progression after downstream actions are complete

relationships.context: Builds on transcript blocks for structured CRM updates
Moves items to [P] status after follow-ups logged
MG-3+ is upstream; MG-6 handles later transition stages
